title: oceanmammam
description: Oceanmammam is the server version of Oceanmanman. Inspired by NIKO YAPS' Modpack. Full credit to Mod devs
body:
# **Oceanmammam Server Modpack** 🌊🫂  
## Under Development  
### For Aden  

**Oceanmammam Server Modpack** is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly selection of mods designed to enhance the multiplayer experience. With improved exploration, better inventory management, and subtle gameplay tweaks, this pack keeps things fun and engaging while maintaining the core feel of Minecraft.  

## **Features:**  
🔹 **Enhanced Exploration & Structures** – Discover expanded dungeons and revamped strongholds with **Dungeons & Taverns and Stronghold Overhaul**.  
🔹 **Better Multiplayer Experience** – Improved chat features, backpack storage, and door mechanics with **Chat Heads, Traveler’s Backpack, and Double Doors**.  
🔹 **Quality-of-Life Improvements** – Smarter inventory management, easier tree chopping, and seamless block interactions with **Lightweight Inventory Sorting, FallingTree, and Simple Copper Pipes**.  
🔹 **Performance & Optimization** – A smoother and more stable server with **ModernFix, Noisium, and Soul Fire’d**.  
🔹 **Entity & Player Interaction Tweaks** – Enhanced mob animations, improved horse mechanics, and better player tracking with **Not Enough Animations, Horse Buff, and What Are They Up To (Watut)**.  
🔹 **Command & Utility Features** – Essential tools for server management with **Essential Commands and Polymorph**.  

## **Included Libraries & APIs** (Required for Compatibility)  
<details>  
  <summary>Click to Expand</summary>  

  - **Architectury API**  
  - **Cardinal Components API**  
  - **Cloth Config API**
  - **Cobweb** 
  - **Collective**  
  - **CoroUtil**  
  - **CreativeCore**  
  - **Cristel Lib**  
  - **Fabric API**  
  - **Fabric Language Kotlin**  
  - **Forge Config API Port**  
  - **FrozenLib**  
  - **JamLib**  
  - **Kiwi 🥝**  
  - **Mineblock's Repeated Utilities (M.R.U)**  
  - **oωo (owo-lib)**  
  - **PandaLib**  
  - **Prism**
  - **Prometheus**
  - **Puzzles Lib**  
  - **Structory**  
  - **SuperMartijn642's Core Lib**  
  - **TCDCommons API**  
  - **Text Placeholder API**  
  - **UnionLib**  
  - **YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)**  

</details>  

## **Credits & Inspiration**  
**Inspired by** [NIKO YAPS' Modpack](https://www.youtube.com/@nikoyaps)  
**Full credit** to all mod developers—none of these are mine.  

Download now and enjoy a fresh yet familiar multiplayer Minecraft experience! 🌊🚀
